ogTitle: Upper Kedron vs Upper Mount Gravatt: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Kedron and Upper Mount Gravatt.
heading: Upper Kedron vs Upper Mount Gravatt — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Kedron, Queensland and Upper Mount Gravatt, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Mount Gravatt has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Upper Kedron (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Kedron or Upper Mount Gravatt safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Kedron has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Upper Mount Gravatt scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Kedron scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Mount Gravatt scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Kedron or Upper Mount Gravatt?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Mount Gravatt has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
